privileged_info_summary: The fillable_hr_form_create task requires creating a form in Apache OpenOffice Writer with specific interactive Form Controls. The output file must be saved at /home/ga/Documents/Apex_New_Hire_Form.odt. The form specifications are defined in form_specs.json and require a minimum of 5 text fields (actual count: 8), 3 checkboxes (actual count: 4), and 1 date field (actual count: 2). The form uses company branding for Apex Structural Engineering (a real company name), located at 1200 Broadway St, Suite 400, San Antonio, TX 78215. The form title is 'New Hire Data Sheet' with three main sections: Employee Information, Employment Details, and Compliance Checklist. All metadata file paths and minimum requirements are consistent with the setup and verification scripts.
